title: neuroloma korovinii
intro: Neuroloma korovinii, also known as the Korovin's neuroloma, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family of Scrophulariaceae. The medicinal properties of Neuroloma korovinii lie in its leaves, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, and protect against cell damage. Neuroloma korovinii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
